function.name: page_length
function.description: Compile a complete LaTeX document and measure its rendered length, returning {ok, fill, page_cap}. `fill` is a decimal where 1.0 == exactly one page; 1.25 == 25% into a second page; 0.8 == 80% of one page. Use this to decide whether to add, tighten, or drop content. Must be a complete document.
